description: Structured funding metadata: payment channels and plans. ATProto-native equivalent of funding.json (fundingjson.org) with DID-signed provenance.

main.description: Machine-readable funding manifest. Declares how people can support this entity — payment channels and optional plans with amounts.

channels.description: Payment channels where contributions can be made.

plans.description: Optional funding tiers or plans with suggested amounts.

createdAt.description: When this manifest was created or last updated.

id.description: Slug identifier for this channel, unique within the manifest (e.g. 'github-sponsors', 'open-collective').

type.description: Channel category: 'payment-provider', 'bank', or 'other'. Defaults to 'other' if omitted.

uri.description: The URL or address for this channel (e.g. https://github.com/sponsors/you).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this channel.

plan.description: A funding plan or tier with a suggested amount.

id.description: Slug identifier for this plan, unique within the manifest.

description.description: Optional description of what this plan covers.

amount.description: Suggested amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD). Use 0 for 'any amount'.

channels.description: Channel IDs where this plan can be fulfilled. If omitted, all channels apply.
